Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8100 "TITANS-C354-8100" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c354 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Titans.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The original routine at $C354 displays the loading screen. The final jump instruction has been changed from JMP $C000 to JMP $8100 as the game is already fully loaded into memory.
